summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the redesigned mumble landing page with dark minimalistic theme and Framer Motion animations. All 14 test categories passed - landing page loads correctly with all sections, navigation works, and advanced animations trigger properly.
passed_tests: Landing page loads at / with dark theme (bg-[#050805])
Scroll progress bar appears at top of page (fixed, green emerald-500 line) - animated with scaleX on scroll
Hero section has word-by-word reveal animation (WordReveal component with blur and opacity transitions)
Language orbit visualization with 18 floating language names orbiting the waveform logo (Spanish, French, Japanese, etc.)
Nav bar 'Start Free' button (data-testid='nav-start-btn') navigates to /chat
Features section uses alternating row layout (md:flex-row / md:flex-row-reverse) with animated icons and gradient accent lines
Features numbered 01-04: Voice-First Conversations, Karaoke Word Tracking, AI Tools Working Live, Adaptive Curriculum
Tools showcase has 4 3D tilt icons (TiltElement component): Grammar, Vocabulary, Pronunciation, Evaluation
Live chat demo animates messages appearing one by one when scrolled into view (ChatDemo with useInView trigger)
Scenarios section with 5 parallax horizontal scroll cards: Job Interview, Travel, Restaurant, Small Talk, Business
CTA section with 'Stop studying. Start speaking.' headline and 'Begin your first lesson' button (data-testid='cta-start-btn') -> /chat
Footer (data-testid='footer') with mumble branding and navigation links: Practice -> /chat, Dashboard -> /dashboard, Vocabulary -> /vocabulary
Nav bar anchor links (Features, How it works, Scenarios) scroll to correct sections (#features, #how-it-works, #scenarios)
All branding shows 'mumble' (lowercase) with Sora font throughout page
critical_code_review_comments: Clean Framer Motion implementation with useScroll, useTransform, useInView, useSpring, useMotionValue hooks
Good use of data-testid attributes on all major interactive elements
Proper responsive design with hidden lg:block for desktop-only language orbit
Dark theme properly applied via bg-[#050805] with emerald accent colors
Parallax effects working via useTransform on scrollYProgress
No basic card layouts - using alternating row design with gradient accent lines
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign fully tested. Key data-testids: navbar, logo-button, nav-start-btn, hero-section, hero-start-btn, hero-dashboard-btn, features-section, tools-section, demo-section, demo-try-btn, scenarios-section, cta-section, cta-start-btn, footer, waveform-logo. All navigation routes tested: /chat, /dashboard, /vocabulary. Framer Motion animations verified: word-by-word reveal (WordReveal), scroll progress bar (useScroll/useSpring), 3D tilt (TiltElement), parallax scenarios (useTransform), chat demo auto-play (useInView). Desktop viewport 1920x1080 used. Language orbit only visible on lg: breakpoint.
